name: Juice Shop — SSTI: user-controlled username concatenated into a Pug template

provenance.note: Vulnerable side is verbatim-real Juice Shop master; safe baseline reconstructed (Juice Shop ships no in-repo fix). Challenge: SSTI.

notes: username = user.username is string-substituted into the Pug source via template.replace(/_username_/g, username) and then pug.compile(template) — a crafted username becomes template code (SSTI -> RCE). Fix compiles a static template and passes username as a runtime local, so it is escaped data rather than template source.
